Model-spectrum harvest pool — REAL grounding errors
A spectrum of 6 pointing models (weak→strong, 3 architectures: MolmoE-1B / Molmo-7B / Molmo2-4B / Qwen2.5-VL-3B+7B / InternVL3-8B) run on the spatial-pointing benchmarks. Each prediction scored vs GT: a HIT is a real positive, a MISS is a REAL hard negative (an actual model error, not constructed). Grouped by (benchmark, item, phrase) so the RM sees good-vs-bad predictions for the same query.
8,424 predictions (3,532 correct / 4,892 wrong) · 1,404 groups · 1,071 groups with both a correct and a wrong pred = directly usable RM preference pairs
Yellow box = GT region · green dot = model hit · red dot = model miss · showing 20 sampled pairs
